scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --target=es2018 --format=iife --outfile=dist/main.js && cp src/ui.html dist/ui.html && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8'));m.main='main.js';m.ui='ui.html';fs.writeFileSync('dist/manifest.json',JSON.stringify(m,null,2));"
